title: Ethiopian coffee prepared with clear communication and dependable support.
intro: Hayked General Trading PLC connects Ethiopian coffee enquiries with practical processing, warehousing, quality communication and export coordination.
aboutTitle: A business partner focused on preparation, responsiveness and long-term trade relationships.
aboutText: Hayked General Trading PLC is an Ethiopian company engaged in coffee-related trading activities, supported by processing, warehousing and export coordination services for international buyers and trade partners.
coffeeTitle: Coffee enquiry options for current buyer requirements.
coffeeText: Use the coffee section to start a conversation about current availability, preferred process, destination and sample needs.
serviceTitle: Connected services from receiving to shipment coordination.
serviceText: Hayked supports coffee preparation, organized storage, quality communication and export follow-up through one coordinated workflow.
qualityTitle: Quality communication that supports better buying decisions.
qualityText: Request coffee information, samples and supporting documents through a clear enquiry path designed for trade buyers.
ctaTitle: Tell Hayked what you need from Ethiopia.
ctaText: Share the coffee type, approximate volume, destination and timing so the team can prepare the most relevant response.
